creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
It also seems that the port's origin is now a full path as opposed to one relative to PORTSDIR:

[0]# pkg query %o rust-1.14.0 
/.../hal/z/SRC/FreeBSD-ports/head/lang/rust
[0]# 

For older ports which were not recently recompiled, the origin is relative:

[0]# pkg query %o zsh-5.3.1 
shells/zsh
[0]#
